  • Perfil do recurso Composition que cria as secções da noticia nascimento

HL7 PT FHIR Implementation Guide: Noticia de Nascimento, publicado por HL7 Portugal. Este guia não é uma publicação autorizada; é a compilação contínua para a versão 1.0.0 construída pela FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard) CI Build. Esta versão é baseada no conteúdo atual de https://github.com/hl7-pt/obs-neonat-ig/tree/release/v1.0.0 e muda regularmente. Veja o Diretório de versões publicadas

  • Content
  • Detailed Descriptions
  • Mappings
  • Examples
  • XML
  • JSON
  • TTL

Resource Profile: Perfil do recurso Composition que cria as secções da noticia nascimento

Official URL: https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/CompositionNoticia Version: 1.0.0
Active as of 2026-05-25 Computable Name: CompositionNoticia

Perfil do recurso Composition que cria as secções da noticia nascimento

Usos:

  • Exemplos para este Perfil: Composition/compNN

You can also check for usages in the FHIR IG Statistics

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Key Elements Table
  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All
NomeBandeirasCard.TipoDescrição e condicionalismos    Filter:
Condicionantes
Obrigações
Vínculos
Composition 0..* Clinical Document A set of resources composed into a single coherent clinical statement with clinical attestation
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
Fatias para extension Conteúdo/regras para todas as fatias
extension:versionNumber 0..* string Version-specific identifier for composition
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/composition-clinicaldocument-versionNumber
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
status ?!Σ 1..1 code preliminary | final | amended | entered-in-error
Vínculo: CompositionStatus (required): The workflow/clinical status of the composition.
Padrão necessário: final
type Σ 1..1 CodeableConcept Kind of composition (LOINC if possible)
Vínculo: FHIRDocumentTypeCodes (preferred): Type of a composition.
Padrão necessário: Pelo menos os seguintes elementos
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Valor fixo: (complexo)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Valor fixo: http://loinc.org/
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Valor fixo: 71230-7
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Valor fixo: Birth certificate
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
encounter SΣ 1..1 Reference(Encounter) Context of the Composition
date Σ 1..1 dateTime Composition editing time
author Σ 1..* Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Device | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization) Who and/or what authored the composition
title Σ 1..1 string Human Readable name/title
Fatias para section C 8..* BackboneElement Sections composing the IPS
Fatia: Não ordenado, Aberto por pattern:code
Constraints: cmp-1, cmp-2
section:Todas as fatias Conteúdo/regras para todas as fatias
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
code S 1..1 CodeableConcept Classification of section (recommended)
Vínculo: DocumentSectionCodes (example): Classification of a section of a composition/document.
section:mother SC 1..1 BackboneElement Composition is broken into sections
Constraints: cmp-1, cmp-2
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
code S 1..1 CodeableConcept Classification of section (recommended)
Vínculo: DocumentSectionCodes (example): Classification of a section of a composition/document.

Documentação para este formato

Terminologia Ligações

Caminho Estado Utilização Conjunto de valores Versão Fonte
Composition.status Base required CompositionStatus 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.type Base preferred FHIR Document Type Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:mother.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:pregnancy.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:birth.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:newborn.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:exams.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:vaccination.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:followup.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:destination.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR

Restrições

Id Grau Caminho(s) Descrição Expressão
cmp-1 error Composition.section, Composition.section:mother, Composition.section:pregnancy, Composition.section:birth, Composition.section:newborn, Composition.section:exams, Composition.section:vaccination, Composition.section:followup, Composition.section:destination A section must contain at least one of text, entries, or sub-sections text.exists() or entry.exists() or section.exists()
cmp-2 error Composition.section, Composition.section:mother, Composition.section:pregnancy, Composition.section:birth, Composition.section:newborn, Composition.section:exams, Composition.section:vaccination, Composition.section:followup, Composition.section:destination A section can only have an emptyReason if it is empty emptyReason.empty() or entry.empty()
dom-2 error Composition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Composition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Composition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Composition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Composition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from Clinical Document

Documentação para este formato
NomeBandeirasCard.TipoDescrição e condicionalismos    Filter:
Condicionantes
Obrigações
Vínculos
Composition 0..* Clinical Document A set of resources composed into a single coherent clinical statement with clinical attestation
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Vínculo: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Vínculos adicionaisObjetivo
AllLanguages Vínculo máximo
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources
Fatias para extension 0..* Extension Extension
Fatia: Não ordenado, Aberto por value:url
extension:versionNumber 0..* string Version-specific identifier for composition
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/composition-clinicaldocument-versionNumber
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
identifier Σ 0..1 Identifier Version-independent identifier for the Composition
status ?!Σ 1..1 code preliminary | final | amended | entered-in-error
Vínculo: CompositionStatus (required): The workflow/clinical status of the composition.
Padrão necessário: final
type Σ 1..1 CodeableConcept Kind of composition (LOINC if possible)
Vínculo: FHIRDocumentTypeCodes (preferred): Type of a composition.
Padrão necessário: Pelo menos os seguintes elementos
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Valor fixo: (complexo)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Valor fixo: http://loinc.org/
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Valor fixo: 71230-7
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Valor fixo: Birth certificate
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
category Σ 0..* CodeableConcept Categorization of Composition
Vínculo: DocumentClassValueSet (example): High-level kind of a clinical document at a macro level.
subject Σ 0..1 Reference(Patient | Practitioner | Group | Device | Location) Who and/or what the composition is about
encounter SΣ 1..1 Reference(Encounter) Context of the Composition
date Σ 1..1 dateTime Composition editing time
author Σ 1..* Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Device | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization) Who and/or what authored the composition
title Σ 1..1 string Human Readable name/title
confidentiality Σ 0..1 code As defined by affinity domain
Vínculo: v3.ConfidentialityClassification (2014-03-26) (required): Codes specifying the level of confidentiality of the composition.
attester 0..* BackboneElement Attests to accuracy of composition
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
mode 1..1 code personal | professional | legal | official
Vínculo: CompositionAttestationMode (required): The way in which a person authenticated a composition.
time 0..1 dateTime When the composition was attested
party 0..1 Reference(Patient | RelatedPerson | Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Organization) Who attested the composition
custodian Σ 0..1 Reference(Organization) Organization which maintains the composition
relatesTo 0..* BackboneElement Relationships to other compositions/documents
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
code 1..1 code replaces | transforms | signs | appends
Vínculo: DocumentRelationshipType (required): The type of relationship between documents.
target[x] 1..1 Target of the relationship
targetIdentifier Identifier
targetReference Reference(Composition)
event Σ 0..* BackboneElement The clinical service(s) being documented
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
code Σ 0..* CodeableConcept Code(s) that apply to the event being documented
Vínculo: v3 Code System ActCode (example): This list of codes represents the main clinical acts being documented.
period Σ 0..1 Period The period covered by the documentation
detail Σ 0..* Reference(Resource) The event(s) being documented
Fatias para section C 8..* BackboneElement Sections composing the IPS
Fatia: Não ordenado, Aberto por pattern:code

Terminologia Ligações

Caminho Estado Utilização Conjunto de valores Versão Fonte
Composition.language Base preferred Common Languages 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.status Base required CompositionStatus 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.type Base preferred FHIR Document Type Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.category Base example Document Class Value Set 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.confidentiality Base required V3 Value SetConfidentialityClassification 📍2014-03-26 a norma FHIR
Composition.attester.​mode Base required CompositionAttestationMode 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.relatesTo.​code Base required DocumentRelationshipType 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.event.code Base example v3 Code System ActCode 📦2018-08-12 a norma FHIR
Composition.section.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section.​mode Base required ListMode 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section.​orderedBy Base preferred List Order Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section.​emptyReason Base preferred List Empty Reasons 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:mother.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:mother.​mode Base required ListMode 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:mother.​orderedBy Base preferred List Order Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:mother.​emptyReason Base preferred List Empty Reasons 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR

Composition.section:pregnancy.​emptyReason Base preferred List Empty Reasons 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR

Composition.section:birth.​emptyReason Base preferred List Empty Reasons 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR

Composition.section:exams.​emptyReason Base preferred List Empty Reasons 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR

Composition.section:vaccination.​mode Base required ListMode 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:vaccination.​orderedBy Base preferred List Order Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:vaccination.​emptyReason Base preferred List Empty Reasons 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:followup.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:followup.​mode Base required ListMode 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:followup.​orderedBy Base preferred List Order Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:followup.​emptyReason Base preferred List Empty Reasons 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:destination.​code Base example Document Section Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:destination.​mode Base required ListMode 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:destination.​orderedBy Base preferred List Order Codes 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR
Composition.section:destination.​emptyReason Base preferred List Empty Reasons 📍4.0.1 a norma FHIR

Restrições

Id Grau Caminho(s) Descrição Expressão
cmp-1 error Composition.section, Composition.section:mother, Composition.section:pregnancy, Composition.section:birth, Composition.section:newborn, Composition.section:exams, Composition.section:vaccination, Composition.section:followup, Composition.section:destination A section must contain at least one of text, entries, or sub-sections text.exists() or entry.exists() or section.exists()
cmp-2 error Composition.section, Composition.section:mother, Composition.section:pregnancy, Composition.section:birth, Composition.section:newborn, Composition.section:exams, Composition.section:vaccination, Composition.section:followup, Composition.section:destination A section can only have an emptyReason if it is empty emptyReason.empty() or entry.empty()
dom-2 error Composition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Composition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Composition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Composition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Composition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from Clinical Document

Resumo

Obrigatório: 22 elementos
Deve ser suportado: 15 elementos
Proibido: 1 elemento

Estruturas

Esta estrutura refere-se a estas outras estruturas:

  • Perfil da mãe (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Mother)
  • Perfil de Informação de gravidez (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Pregnancy)
  • Perfil de Informação do Parto (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Birth)
  • Perfil sobre episódio da notícia de nascimento (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Contact)
  • Perfil do recém-nascido (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Child)
  • Observation Body Height Profile (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/bodyheight)
  • Observation Body Weight Profile (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/bodyweight)
  • Observation Head Circumference Profile (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/headcircum)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - apgarScore (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/ApgarScore)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Dados de malformações (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Malformation)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Fototerapia (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Phototherapy)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Rastreio auditivo neonatal universal (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Hearingscreen)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Rastreio Cardiopatias Congénitas (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Congenital)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Rastreio de doenças metabólicas (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Metabolic)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Teste Reflexo pupilar (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Pupillary)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre Avaliação de risco e referenciação ao NHACJR (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Newbornriskassessment)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre vacinação - hepb (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Hepb)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre vacinação - BCG (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Bcg)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre vacinação - antid (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Antid)
  • Perfil para registar dados do puerpério até à alta (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Puerperium)
  • Perfil da vigilância de saúde infantil (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Childhealthsurveilance)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre entrega de boletim (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Bulletindelivery)
  • Perfil sobre Elaboração de carta com informação clínica suplementar (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Letter)
  • Perfil de informação sobre Transportes (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Transport)

Fatias

Esta estrutura define os seguintes Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Composition.section
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Composition.section.entry

Key Elements View

NomeBandeirasCard.TipoDescrição e condicionalismos    Filter:
Condicionantes
Obrigações
Vínculos
Composition 0..* Clinical Document A set of resources composed into a single coherent clinical statement with clinical attestation
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
Fatias para extension Conteúdo/regras para todas as fatias
extension:versionNumber 0..* string Version-specific identifier for composition
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/composition-clinicaldocument-versionNumber
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
status ?!Σ 1..1 code preliminary | final | amended | entered-in-error
Vínculo: CompositionStatus (required): The workflow/clinical status of the composition.
Padrão necessário: final
type Σ 1..1 CodeableConcept Kind of composition (LOINC if possible)
Vínculo: FHIRDocumentTypeCodes (preferred): Type of a composition.
Padrão necessário: Pelo menos os seguintes elementos
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Valor fixo: (complexo)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Valor fixo: http://loinc.org/
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Valor fixo: 71230-7
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Valor fixo: Birth certificate
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
encounter SΣ 1..1 Reference(Encounter) Context of the Composition
date Σ 1..1 dateTime Composition editing time
author Σ 1..* Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Device | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization) Who and/or what authored the composition
title Σ 1..1 string Human Readable name/title

Caminho Estado Utilização Conjunto de valores Versão Fonte

Restrições

Id Grau Caminho(s) Descrição Expressão
cmp-1 error Composition.section, Composition.section:mother, Composition.section:pregnancy, Composition.section:birth, Composition.section:newborn, Composition.section:exams, Composition.section:vaccination, Composition.section:followup, Composition.section:destination A section must contain at least one of text, entries, or sub-sections text.exists() or entry.exists() or section.exists()
cmp-2 error Composition.section, Composition.section:mother, Composition.section:pregnancy, Composition.section:birth, Composition.section:newborn, Composition.section:exams, Composition.section:vaccination, Composition.section:followup, Composition.section:destination A section can only have an emptyReason if it is empty emptyReason.empty() or entry.empty()
dom-2 error Composition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Composition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Composition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Composition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Composition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

Documentação para este formato

Snapshot View

NomeBandeirasCard.TipoDescrição e condicionalismos    Filter:
Condicionantes
Obrigações
Vínculos
Composition 0..* Clinical Document A set of resources composed into a single coherent clinical statement with clinical attestation
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Vínculo: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.
Vínculos adicionaisObjetivo
AllLanguages Vínculo máximo
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources
Fatias para extension 0..* Extension Extension
Fatia: Não ordenado, Aberto por value:url
extension:versionNumber 0..* string Version-specific identifier for composition
URL: http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/composition-clinicaldocument-versionNumber
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
identifier Σ 0..1 Identifier Version-independent identifier for the Composition
status ?!Σ 1..1 code preliminary | final | amended | entered-in-error
Vínculo: CompositionStatus (required): The workflow/clinical status of the composition.
Padrão necessário: final
type Σ 1..1 CodeableConcept Kind of composition (LOINC if possible)
Vínculo: FHIRDocumentTypeCodes (preferred): Type of a composition.
Padrão necessário: Pelo menos os seguintes elementos
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Valor fixo: (complexo)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Valor fixo: http://loinc.org/
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Valor fixo: 71230-7
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Valor fixo: Birth certificate
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
category Σ 0..* CodeableConcept Categorization of Composition
Vínculo: DocumentClassValueSet (example): High-level kind of a clinical document at a macro level.
subject Σ 0..1 Reference(Patient | Practitioner | Group | Device | Location) Who and/or what the composition is about
encounter SΣ 1..1 Reference(Encounter) Context of the Composition
date Σ 1..1 dateTime Composition editing time
author Σ 1..* Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Device | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization) Who and/or what authored the composition
title Σ 1..1 string Human Readable name/title
confidentiality Σ 0..1 code As defined by affinity domain
Vínculo: v3.ConfidentialityClassification (2014-03-26) (required): Codes specifying the level of confidentiality of the composition.
attester 0..* BackboneElement Attests to accuracy of composition
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
mode 1..1 code personal | professional | legal | official
Vínculo: CompositionAttestationMode (required): The way in which a person authenticated a composition.
time 0..1 dateTime When the composition was attested
party 0..1 Reference(Patient | RelatedPerson | Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Organization) Who attested the composition
custodian Σ 0..1 Reference(Organization) Organization which maintains the composition
relatesTo 0..* BackboneElement Relationships to other compositions/documents
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
code 1..1 code replaces | transforms | signs | appends
Vínculo: DocumentRelationshipType (required): The type of relationship between documents.
target[x] 1..1 Target of the relationship
targetIdentifier Identifier
targetReference Reference(Composition)
event Σ 0..* BackboneElement The clinical service(s) being documented
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
code Σ 0..* CodeableConcept Code(s) that apply to the event being documented
Vínculo: v3 Code System ActCode (example): This list of codes represents the main clinical acts being documented.
period Σ 0..1 Period The period covered by the documentation
detail Σ 0..* Reference(Resource) The event(s) being documented
Fatias para section C 8..* BackboneElement Sections composing the IPS
Fatia: Não ordenado, Aberto por pattern:code
Constraints: cmp-1, cmp-2
section:Todas as fatias Conteúdo/regras para todas as fatias

extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
title 0..1 string Label for section (e.g. for ToC)
code S 1..1 CodeableConcept Classification of section (recommended)
Vínculo: DocumentSectionCodes (example): Classification of a section of a composition/document.
author 0..* Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Device | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization) Who and/or what authored the section
focus 0..1 Reference(Resource) Who/what the section is about, when it is not about the subject of composition
text C 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the section, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
mode 0..1 code working | snapshot | changes
Vínculo: ListMode (required): The processing mode that applies to this section.
orderedBy 0..1 CodeableConcept Order of section entries
Vínculo: ListOrderCodes (preferred): What order applies to the items in the entry.
entry C 0..* Reference(Resource) A reference to data that supports this section
emptyReason C 0..1 CodeableConcept Why the section is empty
Vínculo: ListEmptyReasons (preferred): If a section is empty, why it is empty.

entry:puerperium C 1..1 Reference(Perfil para registar dados do puerpério até à alta) A reference to data that supports this section
entry:childhealthsurveilance C 0..1 Reference(Perfil da vigilância de saúde infantil) A reference to data that supports this section
entry:bulletindelivery C 0..1 Reference(Perfil de Informação sobre entrega de boletim) A reference to data that supports this section
entry:letter C 0..1 Reference(Perfil sobre Elaboração de carta com informação clínica suplementar) A reference to data that supports this section
entry:nextappointment C 0..1 Reference(Encounter) A reference to data that supports this section
entry:transport C 0..1 Reference(Perfil de informação sobre Transportes) A reference to data that supports this section
emptyReason C 0..1 CodeableConcept Why the section is empty
Vínculo: ListEmptyReasons (preferred): If a section is empty, why it is empty.
section:destination C 1..1 BackboneElement Composition is broken into sections
Constraints: cmp-1, cmp-2
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
title 0..1 string Label for section (e.g. for ToC)
code S 1..1 CodeableConcept Classification of section (recommended)
Vínculo: DocumentSectionCodes (example): Classification of a section of a composition/document.
Padrão necessário: Pelo menos os seguintes elementos
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
coding 1..* Coding Code defined by a terminology system
Valor fixo: (complexo)
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
system 1..1 uri Identity of the terminology system
Valor fixo: http://snomed.info/sct
version 0..1 string Version of the system - if relevant
code 1..1 code Symbol in syntax defined by the system
Valor fixo: 45131006
display 1..1 string Representation defined by the system
Valor fixo: Primary care hospital (environment)
userSelected 0..1 boolean If this coding was chosen directly by the user
text 0..1 string Plain text representation of the concept
author 0..* Reference(Practitioner | PractitionerRole | Device | Patient | RelatedPerson | Organization) Who and/or what authored the section
focus 0..1 Reference(Resource) Who/what the section is about, when it is not about the subject of composition
text C 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the section, for human interpretation
This profile does not constrain the narrative in regard to content, language, or traceability to data elements
mode 0..1 code working | snapshot | changes
Vínculo: ListMode (required): The processing mode that applies to this section.
orderedBy 0..1 CodeableConcept Order of section entries
Vínculo: ListOrderCodes (preferred): What order applies to the items in the entry.
entry SC 0..* Reference(Organization) A reference to data that supports this section
emptyReason C 0..1 CodeableConcept Why the section is empty
Vínculo: ListEmptyReasons (preferred): If a section is empty, why it is empty.

Restrições

Id Grau Caminho(s) Descrição Expressão
cmp-1 error Composition.section, Composition.section:mother, Composition.section:pregnancy, Composition.section:birth, Composition.section:newborn, Composition.section:exams, Composition.section:vaccination, Composition.section:followup, Composition.section:destination A section must contain at least one of text, entries, or sub-sections text.exists() or entry.exists() or section.exists()
cmp-2 error Composition.section, Composition.section:mother, Composition.section:pregnancy, Composition.section:birth, Composition.section:newborn, Composition.section:exams, Composition.section:vaccination, Composition.section:followup, Composition.section:destination A section can only have an emptyReason if it is empty emptyReason.empty() or entry.empty()
dom-2 error Composition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources contained.contained.empty()
dom-3 error Composition If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4 error Composition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5 error Composition If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6 best practice Composition A resource should have narrative for robust management text.`div`.exists()
ele-1 error **ALL** elements All FHIR elements must have a @value or children hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1 error **ALL** extensions Must have either extensions or value[x], not both extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from Clinical Document

Resumo

Obrigatório: 22 elementos
Deve ser suportado: 15 elementos
Proibido: 1 elemento

Estruturas

Esta estrutura refere-se a estas outras estruturas:

  • Perfil da mãe (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Mother)
  • Perfil de Informação de gravidez (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Pregnancy)
  • Perfil de Informação do Parto (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Birth)
  • Perfil sobre episódio da notícia de nascimento (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Contact)
  • Perfil do recém-nascido (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Child)
  • Observation Body Height Profile (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/bodyheight)
  • Observation Body Weight Profile (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/bodyweight)
  • Observation Head Circumference Profile (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/headcircum)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - apgarScore (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/ApgarScore)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Dados de malformações (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Malformation)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Fototerapia (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Phototherapy)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Rastreio auditivo neonatal universal (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Hearingscreen)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Rastreio Cardiopatias Congénitas (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Congenital)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Rastreio de doenças metabólicas (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Metabolic)
  • Perfil de informação clinicas - Teste Reflexo pupilar (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Pupillary)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre Avaliação de risco e referenciação ao NHACJR (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Newbornriskassessment)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre vacinação - hepb (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Hepb)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre vacinação - BCG (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Bcg)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre vacinação - antid (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Antid)
  • Perfil para registar dados do puerpério até à alta (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Puerperium)
  • Perfil da vigilância de saúde infantil (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Childhealthsurveilance)
  • Perfil de Informação sobre entrega de boletim (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Bulletindelivery)
  • Perfil sobre Elaboração de carta com informação clínica suplementar (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Letter)
  • Perfil de informação sobre Transportes (https://hl7.pt/fhir/noticia-nascimento/StructureDefinition/Transport)

Fatias

Esta estrutura define os seguintes Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Composition.section
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Composition.section.entry

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron
